TranslationContext: This file contains Unit Names for the Goatmen Raiders Faction.

Translations.Comment: Beast-men raiders. 'Razziatori' conveys raiding/pillaging nature of faction.
Mountain warriors. 'Stambecco' is Italian term for ibex, emphasizing fierce mountain-dwelling nature.
Standard troops. Direct translation maintaining consistency with faction name.
Mixed-breed hordes. 'Branco' emphasizes pack/horde nature; 'Bastardi' conveys mongrel nature.
Spear troops. Standard military term for spear-armed units.
Fast attack vehicle. Conveys rapid assault tactics and raiding purpose.
War beasts. 'Mastini' emphasizes hunting hounds; 'Selvaggi' conveys feral nature.
Light cavalry. Standard term for skirmishing cavalry troops.
Half-man, half-horse. Standard Italian term for mythological creatures.
Bull-headed warriors. Standard Italian term matching fantasy terminology.
Flying monsters. Standard Italian term for mythological harpies.
Untamed giant. Simple, direct translation fitting wargame terminology.
Tribal magic user. 'Sciamano' is standard Italian; maintains faction name consistency.
Elite horn-bearing warrior. Captures impressive horn aesthetic while maintaining wargame tone.
Faction hero. 'Signore' conveys nobility and command authority befitting hero unit.
